about.subtitle: WHO WE ARE
about.title: Melting Consulting
about.desc_lead: Strategic consulting firm specialized in supporting international investors in Benin
about.vision_highlight: Melting Consulting is the bridge between international investors and Benin's exceptional opportunities. We firmly believe that Benin represents the next frontier of growth in the region.
about.vision_text: Our local expertise and international network allow us to offer tailored support to maximize your investments in one of the most dynamic countries in the region.
about.mission_text: Facilitating access to investment opportunities in Benin by offering strategic consulting, market analysis, and operational support. We transform your vision into reality on the ground in Benin.

sectors.subtitle: KEY SECTORS
sectors.title: Investment Opportunities
sectors.desc_lead: Benin offers diversified investment opportunities in high-growth sectors

gdiz.title: Industry & GDIZ
gdiz.desc: The Glo-Djigbe Industrial Zone offers exceptional conditions: total tax exemptions, local cotton and cashew processing, and world-class infrastructure.
gdiz.details_lead: Dive into the heart of the region's most dynamic industrial ecosystem, supported by highly attractive tax policies.
gdiz.details_content:
The Glo-Djigbe Industrial Zone (GDIZ) spans over 1640 hectares just 45 km from Cotonou. Designed as a world-class processing hub, it is dedicated to the local valorization of Beninese agricultural raw materials such as cotton, cashews, pineapples, and shea.

Benefits for Investors

  • Total exemption from customs duties and VAT on equipment.
  • Free repatriation of profits.
  • Administrative single window for rapid setup (company registration, licenses, visas).
  • World-class infrastructure: reliable energy, fiber optics, water treatment.

Investing in GDIZ means choosing a secure environment, backed by the Beninese government's political will to make the country an export hub for finished and semi-finished products.

agro.title: Agro-Industry
agro.desc: State-of-the-art units for processing cotton, soybeans, pineapple, and cashews. Benin is the leading cotton producer in the region.
agro.details_lead: Harness the potential of one of the region's leading agricultural producers through modern processing technologies.
agro.details_content:
Agriculture remains the backbone of the Beninese economy. With a massive government push to move from exporting raw goods to high-value-added processed goods, the agro-industrial sector offers exceptional ROI opportunities.

Strategic Strengths

  • Benin is the leading cotton producer in the region.
  • Abundant, fertile land and a favorable climate for diverse cash crops.
  • State-of-the-art processing infrastructure integrated within the GDIZ.
  • Strong international demand for organic and high-quality Beninese products.

We provide market intelligence, site scouting, and legal support for companies wishing to establish processing facilities or distribution networks.

tourism.title: Memorial Tourism
tourism.desc: Massive investments in cultural heritage: Slave Route in Ouidah, Royal Palaces of Abomey, unique Vodun culture, and ecotourism in national parks.
tourism.details_lead: Participate in the tourism and cultural revival of Benin, the region's future flagship destination.
tourism.details_content:
The Beninese government has allocated over 1 billion euros to the development of the tourism sector, aiming to make the country a global hotspot for memorial, cultural, and eco-tourism.

Development Hubs

  • Ouidah & the Slave Route: Construction of luxury hotel complexes, marinas, and international museums (International Museum of Memory and Slavery).
  • Vodun Tourism: Benin, the cradle of Vodun, now organizes the 'Vodun Days', attracting thousands of diaspora members and curious people from all over the world.
  • Ecotourism: Rehabilitation of the Pendjari National Park, managed by African Parks, home to the largest wildlife in the region (lions, elephants, cheetahs).

Opportunities include building hotel accommodations, developing niche tourism agencies, and creating high-end leisure infrastructure.

logistics.title: Logistics & Transport
logistics.desc: Extension of the Autonomous Port of Cotonou, new Glo-Djigbe International Airport, and privileged connection to the Nigerian market of 220 million inhabitants.
logistics.details_lead: Leverage Benin’s geostrategic position as the premier gateway to regional markets.
logistics.details_content:
With the expansion of the Port of Cotonou and the construction of the Glo-Djigbé International Airport, Benin is rapidly positioning itself as the most efficient logistics platform in the Gulf of Guinea.

Logistics Advantages

  • Direct and rapid access to the Nigerian market, a population of over 220 million consumers.
  • World-class port terminal management (Port of Cotonou/APM Terminals).
  • Modernized transport corridors facilitating road freight to landlocked countries (Niger, Burkina Faso, Mali).

We assist international logistics providers in navigating the local regulatory environment, finding warehouse space, and establishing efficient distribution networks.

tech.title: Technologies & Innovation
tech.desc: Seme City: a 300-hectare technology park training Beninese youth in digital fields and innovation.
tech.details_lead: Invest in the Silicon Valley of the region and the knowledge economy.
tech.details_content:
Benin aims to become the regional headquarters for Tech companies, innovative startups, and cutting-edge academic institutions through the pharaonic Seme City project.

The Digital Ecosystem

  • Seme City: A 300-hectare smart and sustainable city dedicated to training, research, and incubating technology companies.
  • Connectivity: The country is connected to multiple international submarine cables, offering some of the fastest and most stable internet speeds in the sub-region.
  • Financial Services (Fintech): A regulatory environment favorable to the emergence of mobile payment solutions, micro-insurance, and financial inclusion.

Melting Consulting helps technology companies establish themselves, recruit top local talent, and forge strategic partnerships with institutions.

media.title: Audiovisual Production and Cinematography
media.desc: An emerging sector with significant potential in producing audiovisual content for Beninese and international markets.
media.details_lead: Explore the vibrant cultural and media landscape of Benin, an essential market for Beninese storytelling.
media.details_content:
As the region sees a boom in demand for high-quality local content, Benin is establishing itself as a creative hub for audiovisual production, supported by local talent and cultural depth.

Growth Potential

  • Rich historical, cultural, and spiritual narratives waiting to be adapted for global media.
  • Rising demand for digital-first content, documentaries, and entertainment.
  • State initiatives to promote the national cultural and creative economy.

Through our branch Melting Prod, we have a deep understanding of this ecosystem. We offer production support, media consulting, and partnership opportunities for international media groups looking to expand into Benin.
